steps.description: Rust integration test for Lock flow
steps.command: cd src/api/api && SQLX_OFFLINE=true cargo test --test sequence_e2e_test seq1_lock -- --nocapture
steps.expected: Test exits with code 0; stdout confirms lock created in DB, SR0 computed as SHA3-256("QS_LOCK_V1" || chain_id || asset || amount || dest_addr || expiry || nonce || pk_dilithium), and L1 lockWithSR0 transaction submitted without error

steps.description: Playwright integration spec for Consumer Lock
steps.command: cd src/frontend/web && npx playwright test e2e/integration/lock.integration.spec.ts --reporter=json
steps.expected: All Playwright test cases pass (exit code 0); JSON reporter output contains zero failed tests; UI lock creation flow reaches success state and a corresponding DB row is confirmed

steps.description: Verify lock row was created during this run window and pk_dilithium populated
steps.command: psql "$DATABASE_URL" -t -A -c "SELECT lock_id, status, length(pk_dilithium) FROM locks WHERE created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '5 minutes' ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1;"
steps.expected: Exactly one row is returned; status is 'locked' (terminal confirmed state) or 'pending' (awaiting L1 confirmation); pk_dilithium length is exactly 1952 bytes

steps.description: Verify totalLocked increased on Sepolia Vault
steps.expected: Returned uint256 value is strictly greater than 0 wei, confirming the Vault contract at 0x07012aeF87C6E423c32F2f8eaF81762f63337260 has received and recorded the locked asset amount

acceptance_criteria: Backend integration test (seq1_lock) exits with code 0 and stdout confirms SR0 computed and L1 lockWithSR0 submitted
Playwright lock.integration.spec.ts reports zero failed tests and the UI lock flow reaches success state
A locks row exists created within the last 5 minutes with status equal to 'locked' and pk_dilithium length equal to exactly 1952 bytes
Sepolia Vault totalLocked() returns a value strictly greater than 0 wei
No silent fallback or hardcoded address appears anywhere in the execution trace
